retry_reason: After calling crypto_free_ahash and kfree, the object is freed; retrying would cause a use-after-free or double-free. The put must not be retried.
contract_summary: Destructor for AH state: releases the crypto ahash reference (put) and frees the private data (ahp). Called when the xfrm_state is being destroyed; assumes the state is no longer needed. The function is safe to call only once and does not require checking the return value. After this call, the caller must not access the released resources.

check.reason: The candidate path has 7 segments ('x.data.ahash.tfm.base.refcnt.refs') but the type chain has only 6 types ('xfrm_state--ah_data--crypto_ahash--crypto_tfm--refcount_t--atomic_t'). It does not serve as a reference-count wrapper/helper because it does not pass a refcounted object to the caller; it only releases resources. The judge's classification as a wrapper was incorrect.
